name: Crazy Kick! Fun Football game
core_loop: Swipe to control the ball, dodge defenders, and score a goal to advance to the next level.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers, skewing male, ages 8-30, looking for quick, physics-based sports action.
visual_style: 3D hyper-casual, low-poly, bright and colorful with simple stickman characters.

palette.description: Vibrant and sunny palette dominated by sandy yellow and sky blue, with bright green UI accents.
